name: Chris McAulay-Gilbart
quote: Give the man bandwidth, he will make magic happen. Incredible job, Izzy. The process mapping on this will be extremely beneficial to the team.

name: Chris Ridings
quote: Izzy set us up to win on the Canada launch. New markets are never easy, but he got us into a place where we did a dozen go-lives in Canada in two weeks, and an even better place going into August and September.

name: Darin Mellor
quote: Izzy is one of the most energetic and helpful people I have met at this company. He is more than happy to hop on calls when needed or help newer teammates learn the ropes. Izzy is a true role model of what it takes to be successful at LeafLogix.

name: Doug Longnecker
quote: Izzy is easy to work with. He invented the standard T1 dev escalated format. He always presents his issues to the engineers clearly with all the detail required while cutting out the cruft and confusion.

name: Faith Keen
quote: There would be no end wizardry without you Izzy. Thank you for making things make sense and all the time you spend with each and every one of us.

name: Jim Hallman
quote: Izzy's always been quick to help and take on a little more. He's been a real mentor to his coworkers, and has really come to help cement T1 together.

name: Josh Deitch
quote: Six go-lives in a single week. That was the real start of our Canada operation, and Izzy's diligence is what got us there. His dedication to our clients managing through long days doesn't go unnoticed.

name: Kathy Young
quote: Immense gratitude to YOU, Izzy. For being someone we can always count on, creating a standard and making processes repeatable and scalable. When faced with a problem, you take it head on.

name: Katie Goodwin
quote: Supportive, helpful, always willing to jump on with clients or colleagues alike to resolve an issue.

name: Maria DiBenedetto
quote: Izzy has been extremely helpful with getting me ramped being brand new to the Tier 1 role. He'd sign onto Zoom at 9am to teach me Zoho and the backend until it actually clicked. The reason I closed 40+ tickets in my first six weeks is directly because of Izzy.

name: Melanie Nefzger
quote: The most positive and responsive person. Izzy is always available to help troubleshoot with clients and take on any trainings. He remains calm under pressure and focused. I have yet to have had a time when he has not been willing to help out.

name: Olivia Essen
quote: Working with Izzy has been an incredibly positive experience for me, as it has allowed me to grow both personally and professionally. There are plenty of reasons why you should work with Izzy: 1) He never stops learning. After almost every weekend he would tell me about a new skill/trick/something he learned. 2) He radiates positivity. Izzy makes it incredibly hard to have a bad day when you're around him. 3) He is very well connected. Every event I go to, I meet at least one person who not only remembers Izzy by name but was obviously happy to get to know him. 4) He is incredibly versatile and is knowledgeable about virtually anything you talk to him about.
outcome: Personal and professional growth

name: Rob David
quote: Izzy has been very helpful since my start here at the company. He has also been very approachable for any help I needed, and questions I have.

name: Shaun Alphonso
quote: Izzy is a genuinely warm person and makes everyone feel at home in any situation. The most remarkable thing about Izzy is the pure dedication he gives to everything he does. His desire to learn is always inspiring. Izzy is a natural leader, student, and teacher, and one of the best people I know.
outcome: Peer endorsement

name: Stephanie Heintzman-Scheidecker
quote: Izzy is smart, well-spoken, entrepreneurial, but what sets him apart is his attitude. As any great mentor and teacher, he is able to bring out the best in anyone. If you are lucky enough to engage his interest, he will pinpoint your strengths and provided endless encouragement. With dedication, he will help solve your problems, working hours on end until expectations are surpassed. With kindness like no other, his insights on the industry – both conceptual and technical – will be shared. Should you have questions for him, he will spend as much time as required to ensure you understand the answer. Izzy is surely one of those individuals to keep your eye on.
outcome: Peer endorsement of mentorship ability

name: Susan Littlefield
quote: Izzy is always willing to help fix a printer, take a ticket, or jump in a call when needed. His calm demeanor and willingness to be part of the team is a huge benefit. When he leads our Tier 1 meetings, it leads to in-depth discussions of challenging issues.

name: Tom Wonneberger
quote: Izzy is honestly a pleasure to work with. He is always upbeat and has grown a lot in his understanding of the system. Izzy works with me on the technical reasons behind tickets in order to understand what is happening and then work with the client on either avoiding this problem or finding a fix.

name: Adam Kastor
quote: I reached out to Izzy with no expectations, as I'd never sought career advice before. Izzy gave me exactly what I needed; a kickstart! In just our first talk he listened to me and helped me identify some action items I could do right away. He gave me things to think about to help me decide on an area of focus. He had a couple of phrases that I found very insightful and poignant that made me feel a little more confident and optimistic in my search for a new career path. He was generous with his time and thoughtful in his approach and that makes the process of asking for his help that much easier. I would recommend that anyone take advantage of his knowledge, skillset, and attitude.
outcome: Career kickstart and new direction

name: Alison Gibbins
quote: Izzy's coaching didn't just help me get a job — it helped me reframe how I think about my career. I negotiated top pay, extra vacation, and found a role where I make a real difference every day.
outcome: Top of salary range + 5 extra vacation days; transitioned from corporate to nonprofit

name: Andrew Cameron
quote: Before working with Izzy, I had taken expensive career courses that didn't lead anywhere. It all felt like busywork with no results. Izzy creates a positive group dynamic of like-minded people who support and motivate one-another by sharing their successes, learnings and failures. Izzy's system completely transformed my job search from sending out hundreds of applications with no results, to receiving responses from employers within the first week of joining his program. Now, all the work I do seems to feel more productive and get immediate responses. Highly recommend working with him.
outcome: Employer responses in first week (after expensive career courses with no results)

name: Annie Bell
quote: If you're on the fence, go for it. I pondered job search coaching after a LONG job search black hole and was blown away by the $1500+ price tags with zero promises. I joined Izzy's course (at a fraction of the cost I should add) and within weeks got 2 offers. To say he knows his stuff would be the understatement of the year.
outcome: 2 offers within weeks; 200% salary increase (per image evidence)

name: Athena Hernandez
quote: Izzy Piyale-Sheard's expertise as a career coach is unparalleled. His guidance on leveraging ChatGPT for crafting compelling professional summaries, quantifying achievements, and optimizing LinkedIn profiles transformed my job search strategy. With his insightful advice and curated resources, I feel equipped to navigate the competitive job market with confidence.
outcome: Transformed job search strategy using AI

name: Blake McDermott
quote: When I started using the 'Izzy Method,' everything changed. I sent 27 targeted emails, got 3 responses, and landed multiple interviews. Izzy's advice helped me negotiate a $5,000 salary increase.

name: Chris Chipman
quote: Working with Izzy was an absolute game changer. His guidance in narrowing my personal narrative from experience toward tangible quantified metrics and accomplishments gave me a significant edge in my interview... and salary negotiations. With his help I landed an internal Associate Director role and secured a $25k pay increase, far exceeding my expectations. Izzy is a master at reframing perspective, boosting confidence, and setting you up for success.
outcome: $25K salary increase; landed Associate Director role

name: Danica Stark
quote: Izzy was able to guide me in thinking differently about my achievements, which helped me understand the true impact of my work and feel confident in my professional accomplishments. He really took the time to understand the intricacies of my experiences and allowed them to be highlighted in a way that felt authentic and unique to me. I wholeheartedly recommend Izzy to anyone seeking not only a resume overhaul but also a positive and empowering experience in navigating their career journey.
outcome: Improved understanding of professional impact; resume overhaul

name: Daniela Dyer Melhado
quote: After working with Izzy, I was over-the-moon that World Bank offered me the job as a Legal Analyst. Before working with Izzy, I was nervous about my once-in-a-lifetime interview opportunity to work at World Bank. Izzy helped me feel more at ease and confident in myself by honing my interview skills and teaching me to be more concise and targeted with my answers. With Izzy's help, we wrote a strategic thank-you letter after the interview and I got the offer!
outcome: Landed World Bank Legal Analyst position

name: Erin Marini
quote: Izzy was incredible when helping me review my resume and cover letter. He taught me really good tricks for getting your resume noticed and key points to include and frame your cover letter. He was so patient, friendly and helpful. I would highly recommend Izzy to anyone who is looking for career advice, job applications or general insight into job searches.
outcome: Resume and cover letter improvement

name: Gamze Aluc
quote: Izzy's insights and suggestions about my resume were valuable so that I could create my next steps. Also, he showed me some points I had never realized before about the interviewing process. Getting feedback from a professional is helpful, and you must work with him if you want to invest in your career.
outcome: Resume insights and interview process awareness

name: Haddie Lengyuen
quote: Izzy's encouragement along with easy-to-follow career tools bolstered my confidence to ask for informational interviews with those I admired - and I landed new jobs! In fact, the majority of my jobs were from reaching out! At the time, I only had a high school diploma as my highest level of education so I had a difficult time getting past the gatekeepers for online job applications. Much of my career success can be attributed to the core principles Izzy taught me at the start of my career.
outcome: Multiple jobs landed through outreach (with only a high school diploma)

name: Hamsharan Mahalingam
quote: I had a great time with Izzy and I would like to start doing what he has recommended more. Here's to me landing a job.
outcome: Career guidance

name: Henrique Perez
quote: Izzy helped me gain confidence and present my achievements effectively. I received two job offers in a week and negotiated a 30% higher salary. The program works — I even recommended it to three people, and two of them found jobs. Izzy is not just a coach; he's a true partner in your success.
outcome: 2 offers in 1 week; 30% salary increase; recommended program to 3 people (2 also found jobs)

name: Jeska Edens
quote: Honestly it all sounds so much more achievable with Izzy's confidence in what I have to do! I already feel so much better about my prospects it's crazy.
outcome: Renewed confidence and achievable goals

name: Jessica Leung
quote: Izzy is extremely generous with his time, positive, insightful, knowledgeable, approachable, and produces high-quality work. When he agreed to help me create a website, he showed genuine interest in my career and was determined to help build my online media presence. He took the time to get to know me, my personality, and my brand as a performing artist to ensure that the design he used effectively reflected my brand. Extra time was spent outside of our meetings to continue developing and adding to my website. I met Izzy approximately three months ago and he has been inspiring me with his work and drive ever since. I would recommend people to work with Iskender on their projects as well!
outcome: Professional website creation and brand development

name: Jorge Garboza
quote: Before working with Izzy, I spent 12 months job searching. I applied to over 160 jobs. I had 16 interviews... But I never landed an offer. After joining Izzy's program, he helped me with the whole interview process. Before, during and after the interview. And today, I finally landed an offer. With Izzy's motivation, strategies and help, I even negotiated $6K increase on my initial offer (even after they said there they couldn't go higher).
outcome: Offer after 12 months searching + $6K negotiated increase (after employer said "couldn't go higher")

name: Kay Woods
quote: Izzy is no hype. This man is a real life wizard of 'work', and he's sensitive with a big ole heart. He is worth every penny. In fact he doesn't charge enough for what he does. Someone said resourceful, I'd agree. He's leveraging technology in ways most coaches don't even know HOW TO use yet. If and when his prices go up it will be fair and overdue - so get in now, while you still can. Izzy will be one of those coaches you heard of people using - but they don't accept new clients. Don't be sorry.
outcome: Endorsement of coaching value and tech-forward approach

name: Kedar Nadkarny
quote: I am a new immigrant to Canada and needed help with my resume to be in Canadian format. I came across Izzy and he helped me fine tune my resume. The focus on mentioning metrics based performance for tech profile like mine was really important. My Resume came across more mature to recruiters and people in my network. Highly recommend Izzy.
outcome: Canadian-format resume with metrics-based tech profile

name: Kevin Truong
quote: Being a startup founder and having a jack of all trades skillset; I struggled with narrowing my career pathway. Working with Izzy, he helped me identify key elements of my experience, craft a stronger intro story and creating an impact profile through my resume and social feeds. Izzy provides a very interpersonal 1:1 approach towards one career journey!
outcome: Career pathway clarity; stronger intro story and impact profile

name: Kira McLean
quote: His invaluable support empowered me to negotiate a strong counteroffer, securing competitive compensation, good benefits, and the long-term stability I needed.

name: Kristin Davis
quote: After working with Izzy, I was employed in just three weeks. Before my interview, he advised me to act like a consultant and that mindset shift changed everything.

name: Laura Salamanca
quote: I landed the role and bumped my salary by $22,000 a year, more than a 30% increase. Izzy is a warm, caring, and impactful coach that really knows his stuff.

name: Leanne Saldanha
quote: Folks, this is huge! Izzy is such a genius. I've sent out ONE reach out email. Izzy helped me every step of the way with selling my accomplishments and skills in the reach out. The guy I sent it to opened it 4 times and then forwarded it to a colleague to schedule a conversation with me about the position they are hiring for.
outcome: Interview scheduled from a single outreach email

name: Loisel Wilson
quote: *(No text testimonial on file — image screenshot only)*
outcome: Got into an event

name: Maria Chami
quote: Izzy was kind and understanding while listening to my concerns. He provided valuable tips for me moving forward, and made really astute observations about my situation, reading between the lines in ways I never thought of. Would definitely recommend him!
outcome: Valuable career tips and astute situational observations

name: Marsha Druker
quote: When I needed a refresher on salary negotiation after working for myself for three years, Izzy helped me evaluate two exciting opportunities, determine a realistic salary range, and prepare for negotiations. With Izzy's guidance, I accepted my dream tech marketing role and even negotiated a 10k bump on the initial offer. Izzy's invaluable advice and reassurance helped me navigate the process with confidence, and I highly recommend him as a career coach. Thank you, Izzy!
outcome: $10K negotiated bump on initial offer; accepted dream tech marketing role

name: Marsha Malcolm
quote: I can't speak highly enough about Izzy's talent for coaching and his ability to provide actionable strategies for a successful job search. After just one session, I felt much better about my prospects and more confidence in myself as an applicant. Implementing Izzy's suggestions helped me successfully transition into a field that I had been interested in for a long time. Believe the hype, Izzy is the real deal!
outcome: Successful field transition

name: Mazia Syed
quote: Izzy has always exceeded my expectations in our work together. It's clear that he genuinely cares about my success and I have noticed a renewed sense of energy since we started working together. He will absolutely bring out the best in you. Take the leap - you won't regret it.
outcome: Renewed energy and exceeded expectations

name: Nabeel K Adeni
quote: Izzy is more than just a coach, he's a strategist - generous, patient, tech-savvy, and a mentor who gets the business of career growth. He lives the ethos of helping others succeed to find your own path to success. Izzy's approach is not just about coaching; it's a masterclass in career strategy. Izzy's positivity is infectious, possibly making him the sunniest person on the planet! He generously extended our initial 25min call to a substantial 75min brainstorm, dedicating time to truly understand and assist me for my interview. I'm also inspired by how Izzy has built ClearCareer. His blend of coaching prowess, listening skills, top-notch AI resources, and super-useful templates are nothing short of remarkable. He expertly guided me to refine my interview positioning, transforming my storytelling from vague narratives to impactful, Quentin Tarantino-esque hooks that grab attention. Also, his skill in discerning the essence of job descriptions speaks to his wisdom in seeing beyond the apparent. Thank you, Izzy, for being an exceptional mentor and an even more exceptional human being. Here's to your ongoing success!
outcome: Interview positioning refined; storytelling transformed

name: Raunika Lamge
quote: Thanks to his support, I stayed focused and landed a Director-level role at a large Canadian payments company. Izzy combines smart strategy with emotional support.

name: Rose Wan
quote: Izzy is always the person in the room with the biggest smile! He had encouraged me to use GitHub and even gave me a tutorial of how to fork and make a pull request on his AI repo when I didn't even know what GitHub was! I like how in presentations, he keeps the atmosphere lively with his puns and stories. It truly marks his character of being so upbeat! Even after working together, he encouraged me to volunteer and to get the most out of life. Izzy is a true inspiration.
outcome: Learned GitHub basics; encouraged to volunteer

name: Sarvesh Syal
quote: Just got off a call with a person I had an informational interview with. She was admiring the professionalism of my email. Just thought I'd give credit where credit is due. Thanks Izzy.
outcome: Professional email praised by informational interview contact

name: Sparsh Kalia
quote: I followed his advice exactly and within 30 days, I had a job. Trust his process and put in the effort, you won't regret it.

name: Susanne
quote: Izzy's program gave me the tools, confidence, and community I needed to navigate the job market. The group's support was invaluable, and the strategies I learned were a game-changer.
outcome: Operations Manager role in medical billing (new industry after prolonged unemployment)

name: Tamara Gordon
quote: I landed a role with a $20,000 salary increase plus annual bonuses, giving me the financial stability I needed for my family. Izzy is a game-changer. 10 out of 10.

name: Tiana Eghdam
quote: *(No text testimonial on file — image screenshot only)*
outcome: Interview preparation

name: Victor Perez
quote: I've spent the past the last 11 months applying to over 500+ job postings and have only landed 10 interviews and no offers. After some intense and riveting work with Izzy and learning to feel sure-footed outside of my comfort zone, we've cracked the code. I'm ecstatic with my LinkedIn profile redesign. And my newly crafted resume quite simply invites attention. Amazed how just 2 weeks after partnering with Izzy I've landed 3 interviews directly with the employer not recruiter screenings! 2 of them I had directly applied for on employer career page, and the third reached out to me after they came across my new LinkedIn profile. Izzy, when you know, you know. And you definitely know. Thanks for having my back!
outcome: 3 interviews in 2 weeks (after 11 months, 500+ applications, 10 interviews, 0 offers)

name: Victor Rivas
quote: Before taking this first session I could not see the full potential of my profile. Izzy was able to get all of the possible details from myself to make me feel more confident and turn my profile into a great looking one. I can now see a side of my professional career I was not able to before. Izzy is an awesome career coach, I feel great about my interview.
outcome: Confidence boost; profile transformation

name: Wil Gerard
quote: Izzy helped me rebuild my confidence and approach job searching with renewed energy and focus after being recently unemployed. He helped me hone in on my strengths and communicate them effectively, leading me to receive three job offers. With Izzy's guidance, I negotiated a $10k raise and felt empowered and confident in my abilities. Izzy's thoughtful insight and genuine care were instrumental in achieving my career goals, and I highly recommend him as a career coach.
outcome: 3 job offers + $10K negotiated raise

name: Win Shi Wong
quote: Izzy truly cares about getting to know you, your skills and experiences, and what you're looking for in your next career. His thorough resume review was insightful and he provided actionable feedback. He is knowledgeable, resourceful, and tech-savvy. He even built tools using automation and AI to help candidates find jobs in a smarter way. After the call, he sent a detailed summary with action items to keep me accountable. I highly recommend Izzy as a career coach!
outcome: Insightful resume review with actionable feedback

name: Akhil Verghese
quote: I met Izzy on my first day of the Hacker Paradise get-away at Bali. He was lugging an enormous can of water up some stairs, but set it aside to welcome me to the group before proceeding to accompany me to my room with said can, presumably to make sure I didn't get lost along the hotel's only corridor. As a community manager, he always managed to provide exactly the sort of energy a group or person needed at a given time.

name: Allison Vicenzi
role: Head of Education, 3Doodler / Founder, material nyc
quote: From the moment I was accepted into HP until the moment I arrived, Izzy was there to answer all of my questions and also to check in and make sure I was all set before coming. He had prepared numerous resources and documents ahead of time to ensure a smooth arrival, but even when I asked a question that he had so clearly answered in these documents he didn't get frustrated and instead answered everything calmly and clearly again. Once I was there, I was impressed with Izzy's ability to rally the group for events and internal brainstorms.

name: Andre Barnes
quote: I had a great experience with Izzy. He provided great service, good follow through and was often the life of the room. I got really sick when I was in Bali with Izzy and Hackers Paradise, to the point I had to be hospitalized. Izzy was able to facilitate my mother coming to help me, visiting me in the hospital and just handling coordination of making sure I had everything I needed, very much appreciated.

name: Blanca Martinez
quote: Izzy was an engaging, charismatic and a thoughtful community manager and trip facilitator. When I arrived at Hacker Paradise, I was simply there accompanying my partner unsure of what the community would be like. However, during introductions Izzy gave such encouraging and insightful welcome that I immediately saw myself being part of Hacker Paradise. Additionally, when my partner became ill, Izzy was very supportive and helped me navigate the medical system in Indonesia, all with patience and kindness. He was exceptionally prepared to deal with all kinds of issues.

name: Christian Greiner
role: International Corporate Development, Strascheg Center for Entrepreneurship
quote: Izzy has always been a very empathic, big-smile and 'welcome everyone with open arms'-person. He is the kind of person that makes friends everywhere on the planet. He always played a big part in getting the attending individuals being a big family group. He took care of organising field trips, hikes and other activities, always with a good mix of comfort and adventure. Apart from being a non-stop smiling and having fun guy, you will find a time where you can talk with him about serious topics. All together I couldn't imagine having a better facilitator, motivator and travel buddy at my side, except of my wife of course.

name: Creighton Wong
quote: Izzy is an incredible human being. He is a great leader with an other-worldly positive attitude which permeated our group. Izzy was our leader. He facilitated all our group activities, planned all of our adventures through Vietnam and Bali, made sure that each of us was taken care of.

name: Haiko Schol
role: Senior Software Engineer, Meelogic Consulting AG
quote: Izzy always made sure everyone was informed about group activities while also offering just the right amount of encouragement to join. He also took care of organizational issues like making sure everyone has a payment card for the metro and bikesharing system and knows how to sign up for it.

name: Heidi Priebe
quote: When I was struggling professionally, Izzy took the time to brainstorm ideas one-on-one with me. When group members experienced personal challenges, Izzy was the first one to check in with them and ensure they felt heard and cared for. And when anyone was feeling remotely down, Izzy was there to pump up the energy level and get everyone excited. I'm not sure I've ever met someone who works so hard and so efficiently at both the technical and personal aspects of maintaining a community.
outcome: Professional and community support during Hacker Paradise era

name: Henry Snow
quote: Do you know how practical Izzy is? When we were working together at Hacker Paradise, Izzy always had practical and efficient solutions to problems. It doesn't matter if it was something complex, like establishing a wi-fi network for thirty developers, or something simple, like fixing a door. Izzy always found an innovative answer. He thinks outside the box. There was a housing problem for several participants where we had to lock an 'un-lockable' door between two rooms. I was thinking we should get a lock and begin drilling the door handle, a task that would take an hour or more. Do you know what Izzy did? He got a screwdriver and went to the co-working space to take out some screws from a table. Then, he screwed them into the 'un-lockable' door. Problem solved, and it only took five minutes.

name: Jeremy Sharvit
quote: Izzy's personality is super contagious. He's always laughing and down to do pretty much anything. Being able to control a group of 40 people while still coming off as a fun, laid back guy is no easy task, and Izzy handled it flawlessly. No matter what situations traveling through foreign countries threw at us, he has a great talent for keeping his cool and getting the job done.

name: Jesse Norton
quote: Izzy is outstanding in his ability to motivate, focus and inspire individuals with his indefatigable dedication to providing perspective, insight and vision. So if you're looking to work with somebody dependable, approachable and inspiring consider yourself lucky to work with Izzy - he's as cool as cucumber and as awesome as a stegosaurus with laser beams attached to its head.
outcome: Community collaboration during Hacker Paradise

name: Jessica Duhadway
quote: Izzy stood out right away as an optimistic and mood lifter within the group. He brought energy and life with him to the meetings and events that Hacker Paradise put on as well as events outside of that. It was very welcoming the way that Izzy knew a bit of who you were before starting the trip but then just the first week he reached out to everyone individually to get to know them and made sure people were comfortable and settling in nicely. Izzy impressed as he ran to resolve different situations that came up. Up late with those that were working the night shift, Izzy was able to put together a hot spot quickly when the Internet died, allowing everyone to continue working until the Internet came back online.

name: Ken Hu
quote: Izzy is a fantastic and dynamic community manager. Often he's seen at the forefront, leading activities and events. At the same time, he is also great at listening and encouraging us to connect with other members who can help.

name: Kendall Cole
quote: Izzy is a fantastic community manager and trip facilitator. His cheerfulness is contagious, and he's so outgoing and entertaining he often became the de facto trip leader on our excursions for groups of complete strangers. One time in Hoi An he started MCing on the bus, which was about half our group, half others, and immediately began asking people where they were from, opening up the bus to great group conversations. Everything was well-organized during at the Hacker Paradise sites, and Izzy was readily available to address any questions or concerns.

name: Kevin Crimi
quote: I can't think of anyone better suited for the job. Izzy is basically a box of concentrated fun and smiles squashed into a very explosive package. Intimidated by strangers nor language barriers, I've seen Izzy transform uninterested crowds into raging dance parties on multiple occasions, becoming the best friend of literally everyone in the building, whether they could understand anything he said or not.

name: Melissa Choi
quote: Izzy is a man who is the life of the party. He leads by example, rallying people together through sheer enthusiasm and friendliness. It doesn't matter what situation you put Izzy in, he will make friends with everyone in the room. For example, we went to a ridiculous bar one time in Vietnam. It was more of a club than a bar, but everyone was just sitting around, while the DJ blasted obnoxiously loud music at us. No one was dancing. Until Izzy literally went to every table in the bar/club, made friends, and corralled them onto the dance floor. He started that party. It was a running joke that Izzy was the best club promoter in Vietnam. He also knows when someone needs his attention on a more serious note. He is aware and attune to people's needs and is an easy person to talk to.

name: Niels de Hoog
quote: Izzy would go out of his way to make new community members feel welcome right from the start. He made sure he was there to greet you, even if that meant waiting in a tiny room the whole day while others were out having fun. The vibe he managed to create was one in which everyone could feel welcome and accepted. Together, we had some great adventures on our trip, like being taken on a hot spring tour by a retired car salesman in Taipei. The entire time we were being shown around, Izzy managed to keep a conversation going in Mandarin Chinese, even though he had only started learning the language a couple of weeks earlier.

name: Phillip Gourley
quote: I was working alongside Izzy as a Community Manager in Barcelona with Hacker Paradise, we worked together on weekly events, facilitating, programme schedules and everything in between.

name: Thomas Redfern
quote: Izzy was great to be around in Bali. While I was there he was the only one in charge of organizing events for 50 people with different schedules, and he somehow pulled it off. Despite the large number of people he also did a great job of staying in touch and making sure everyone had everything they needed.

name: Alex
quote: Izzy showed a lot of useful tools and techniques I didn't know about. He was very insightful, the style he presents is engaging and he's a funny guy. I recommend his webinars to everyone.
outcome: Discovered useful tools and techniques

name: Angie Graves
quote: Great content, learned about new tools that I didn't know were out there. Made an intimidating concept not so scary!
outcome: Overcame AI intimidation; discovered new tools

name: Barbara Dye
quote: I was blown away by a recent session Izzy led on 10 AI Strategies to Level Up Your Job Search. He definitely knows the GenAI landscape and it was clear he's spent a lot of time perfecting various prompts. If he is this good during a GenAI session I'm sure as a career coach he is even more effective. This session gave me a boost in hope and confidence in my job search efforts - highly recommend Izzy!
outcome: Boost in hope and confidence

name: Dave Basham
quote: An engaging presentation about how to use AI throughout the entire job search, including lots of examples, and tools you probably didn't know existed!
outcome: Discovered tools for entire job search process

name: Denise Merzon
quote: If you want to learn about AI which is so important today and for the future, especially as an older individual in competing in today's highly competitive marketplace, it is imperative to become comfortable with AI. It could be scary at first, however, it can be fun as well.
outcome: Overcame AI intimidation as an older job seeker

name: Ellie Hoekman
quote: Izzy is a wizard! I went to his workshop on utilizing AI to build a resume, prep for interviews, and succeed in the job search with ease. Izzy has broken down the fundamentals of impactful career coaching into AI models to make excellent resume writing, email writing, and interviewing accessible to more job seekers! He's also a genuine person who wants to see you succeed.
outcome: Learned AI-powered career strategies

name: Glenna Eastwood

He's done the work for you! What a great resource!

name: Robert Heavill
quote: It's critical to get up to speed on this approach to finding a job. Not AI hype but very actionable info focusing on finding a job. Nice summary of the overall process and how to prepare for each step, not just 'the interview' part. Excellent coverage beyond the ChatGPT info we are used to.

name: Sandra D Gray
quote: I can honestly say that my perception of AI has turned 180 degrees. I have been exploring the various practical uses of AI and attempting to educate myself. I realize that adaptability is the key to survival. Without the aid of AI, I learned that throwing out industry buzz-words and vague imagery did not impress anyone. I had to learn who my audience included long before any meeting. Now, I will add AI to my skill sets in order to abbreviate my exposure time to impress whomever or whatever I need to in order to be the candidate for the position.
outcome: 180-degree perception shift on AI; embraced adaptability

name: Suellen Nelles
